integrity.description: The agent interacted with the reference manager GUI to add the authors.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the reference manager application (e.g., Zotero) open with the info pane being edited, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing entries rather than creating new ones.
integrity.visual_evidence: The main library view does not show duplicate titles for the target papers.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The modifications are visible within the actual reference manager interface, not a generic text editor like Notepad or Gedit.

privileged_info_for_vlm: 1. 'Attention Is All You Need': Must include Noam Shazeer, Niki Parmar, and Jakob Uszkoreit (in that order after Vaswani). 2. 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition': Must include Xiangyu Zhang, Shaoqing Ren, and Jian Sun. 3. 'Molecular Structure of Nucleic Acids': Must include Francis H.C. Crick. 4. 'Generative Adversarial Nets': Must include Jean Pouget-Abadie and Mehdi Mirza. The application used is a reference manager (like Zotero).
